# ADR-0001: Sign mode textual

## Status

Accepted — 2026-01-05

## Context

A well-formed decision, the "main" document of an annex-companion pair — the
other half, `0001-sign-mode-textual-annex1.md`, shares this file's base slug
and differs only by a recognizable annex suffix (found running R5's
cosmos-sdk: ADR-050 is exactly this shape, a main doc plus two annexes).

## Decision

Use this as one half of the seeded ADR-0009 violation: same directory, same
number, annex-shaped — must surface as advisory, not fact.

## Consequences

None beyond the seeded D1 finding, downgraded per ADR-0009.
